case_title: ROBINSON & ASSCOCIATES,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. LORETTA WALLACE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON & ASSCOCIATES,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LORETTA DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-26-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-12-2003

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON & ASSCOCIATES,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLACE, LORETTA $2,970.95 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $378.67 INTEREST, $150.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,159.92, ORIG. ASSIGNMENT STAMPED JUDGMENT RENDERED HEREON

BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-26-2003 CONTINUED TO JAN-02-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $150.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LORETTA
